name: Eggnog
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, non-aluminum metal bowl, combine the sugar, egg whites, water, and cream of tartar. Whisk until blended.
2. Set the bowl over a pan of simmering water, ensuring it does not touch the water. Beat with an electric mixer on medium for about 10 minutes, or until the mixture registers 140°F on a candy thermometer and is very thick and fluffy. Continue beating for another 3 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. In another large bowl, combine the milk and vanilla extract. Gradually add the egg white mixture and brandy or rum, whisking gently to combine.
4. Serve well-chilled and dusted with nutmeg. The nog may separate when standing but can be easily recombined by whisking.
Per serving: 176 CAL; 6G Prot.; 0.2G FAT; 29G CARB.; 2MG CHOL; 96 MG SOD.; 0 FIBER. OVO-LACTO
